regions.name: Riyadh
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit from November to March when temperatures are moderate and ideal for exploring the capital's modern attractions and traditional souks.

regions.name: Makkah
regions.bestTimeToVisit: The best time is during Hajj season (Islamic calendar) or Umrah outside of peak Hajj months when temperatures are cooler.

regions.name: Madinah
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit from October to April when the weather is pleasant and suitable for visiting the Prophet's Mosque and surrounding holy sites.

regions.name: Eastern Province
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Best visited from November to March when temperatures are cooler and humidity is manageable for exploring oil fields and coastal areas.

regions.name: Asir
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit from May to September when the high altitude provides cool, pleasant weather perfect for hiking and exploring mountain villages.

regions.name: Jizan
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Best visited from October to March when temperatures are warm but not excessively hot, ideal for enjoying beaches and coastal activities.

regions.name: Najran
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit from November to February when the climate is cooler and more comfortable for exploring desert landscapes and historical sites.

regions.name: Northern Borders
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Best visited from October to April when temperatures are moderate and the desert landscape is most accessible for exploration.

regions.name: Qassim
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit from November to March when temperatures are cooler, ideal for exploring agricultural oases and traditional towns.

regions.name: Ha'il
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Best visited from October to April when the weather is pleasant for exploring rock art sites and desert landscapes.

regions.name: Tabuk
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit from November to March when temperatures are mild, perfect for enjoying beaches and exploring historical sites.

top10.name: Makkah
top10.description: The holiest city in Islam and home to the Kaaba, the most sacred site in Muslim worship. Millions of pilgrims visit annually for the Hajj pilgrimage and Umrah year-round.

top10.name: Madinah
top10.description: The second holiest city in Islam, home to the Prophet's Mosque and the Prophet Muhammad's tomb. It attracts millions of religious pilgrims and visitors seeking spiritual significance.

top10.name: Riyadh
top10.description: The capital and largest city of Saudi Arabia, featuring modern skyscrapers, shopping malls, and cultural institutions. It serves as the primary hub for business, culture, and tourism in the kingdom.

top10.name: Jeddah
top10.description: A major Red Sea port city known for its historic old town, vibrant waterfront, and gateway status for Hajj pilgrims. It offers beaches, cultural sites, and serves as a key international gateway.

top10.name: Abha
top10.description: The capital of Asir and a vibrant mountain city known for its cool climate, lush green valleys, and modern infrastructure. It serves as the cultural and economic hub of the region with excellent restaurants, markets, and accommodations.

top10.name: Al-Khobar
top10.description: A coastal city in the Eastern Province on the Arabian Gulf, known for its beaches and modern amenities. It serves as a major commercial and leisure destination for residents and visitors.

top10.name: Al-Ula
top10.description: An ancient desert valley containing the UNESCO-listed Madain Salih archaeological site with Nabatean rock-carved tombs. It represents pre-Islamic Arabian heritage and has become a major cultural tourism destination.

top10.name: Taif
top10.description: A historical mountain city near Makkah known for its rose gardens, cooler climate, and religious significance. It attracts pilgrims and tourists seeking respite from the heat of lower elevations.

top10.name: Dammam
top10.description: The capital of the Eastern Province and largest city in the region, featuring the iconic King Fahd Causeway connecting to Bahrain and a vibrant port city atmosphere. Known for its markets, seafood restaurants, and urban energy.

top10.name: Ha'il City
top10.description: The capital and largest city of Ha'il region, known for its historic oasis settlement and modern development. It serves as the cultural and commercial hub with traditional souks, museums, and vibrant local markets that showcase Najdi heritage.
